candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue line; equals Total Revenue and is the cleaner non-total label.
Also represents top-line revenue, but it is a total/subtotal duplicate of Revenue.
Not revenue; this is a cost line.

candidates.row_label: Interest income on financial assets at amortized cost
candidates.why: Financial income, not sales revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Finance result, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl Extra Ordinary
candidates.why: Net income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Operating profit metric, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Balance sheet receivable, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Use Revenue first; Total Revenue is a valid fallback label for years where Revenue might be absent.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line and best non-balancing, non-duplicate label.
Also valid COGS but appears duplicative of Cost of goods sold.
Acquisition/investing item, not operating cost of sales.

candidates.row_label: Raw Materials, consumables and semi-finished goods
candidates.why: Inventory component on the balance sheet, not period COGS expense.
Balance sheet/inventory style label, not period COGS expense.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of goods sold - Balancing value

variables.notes: Selected the primary direct cost line; excluded duplicate Cost of revenues/COGS and balancing rows.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-style overhead line and populated; per hierarchy, select only this row when present.
Administrative overhead component, but subordinate/partial relative to explicit SG&A line.
Administrative overhead component, but explicit SG&A row exists and should be preferred alone.
Overhead-like bucket, but broader and includes non-SG&A items; not needed when explicit SG&A exists.
Would be an overhead component if populated, but explicit SG&A row exists.
Potential overhead component, but explicit SG&A row exists and this may be broader than SG&A.
R&D line exists only as supplemental below EBIT; map to XRD separately, not needed in XSGA when explicit SG&A exists and inclusion is unclear.
Balance sheet liability, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|missing. Explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so selected only that row. Excluded administrative subcomponents and other operating expenses to avoid subtotal/component overlap. Did not add the supplemental R&D row because it appears below operating profit and inclusion within SG&A is unclear.

candidates.why: Only dedicated R&D label present. It appears below operating profit, so it should not be included in XSGA, but it can still be mapped to XRD.

variables.notes: Mapped the only dedicated R&D line to XRD. It appears below EBIT/operating result, so it was not also added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost total that includes FX and other items; less preferred than granular recurring interest line.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on financial liabilities at amortized cost
candidates.why: Best recurring interest-expense line; more granular and cleaner than total Financial expenses.
Derivative-related and not preferred for recurring core interest expense.
Minority interest in earnings, not interest expense.
Minority interest in earnings, not interest expense.
Minority interest label, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Recurring interest-like item, but appears to overlap with the effective interest/interest liability disclosures; selecting it together risks double counting.
Balance sheet accrual, not period interest expense.
Liability balance, not expense.
Liability balance, not expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses on financial liabilities at amortized cost

variables.notes: Preferred the granular recurring interest line over total Financial expenses, which includes FX and other non-interest items. Excluded derivative interest and lease-interest supplemental rows to avoid double counting/less core financing noise.

candidates.why: Earnings from affiliates, not book equity.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity for the shareholders in the parent company
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line and excludes non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interest, so less preferred for BE when separate NCI exists.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line, not equity.
Balancing line, not equity.
Balancing line, not equity.
Total balance sheet line, not equity attributable to owners.

final_choice.row_label: Equity for the shareholders in the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred parent-shareholder equity because MIB is separately available; this avoids double counting non-controlling interests.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement OCI/attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Best balance sheet NCI line for minority interest.
Also valid balance sheet NCI label; useful fallback if label varies by year.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet minority-interest labels only. Non-controlling interest is preferred; Minority Interest is a fallback label.
